description: Create a chapter divider slide titled The Technology with a short explanatory paragraph and three key themes in a left-aligned content layout.

header.kicker: Technology Vision 2025 | AI: A Declaration of Autonomy
header.headline: The Technology
header.sub: Enterprises are clearly eager to bring generative AI and greater autonomy to customer-facing roles. But to do this in a way that will strengthen—rather than harm—ties with customers, they will need a deep understanding of the technological advances letting chatbots move beyond generic-ness.
